positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric silhouette of a sleeping cat and a crescent moon viewed through a stylized archway. The composition should be centered, highly detailed, and feature strong, elegant lines. The color palette is limited to deep midnight indigo, ethereal silver, and soft gold accents. The style is a blend of Art Deco and celestial line art, emphasizing clean separation of forms and a perfect circular crop. The lighting should be dramatic and flat (like graphic design), ensuring high contrast and perfect printability on fabric. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, suitable for t-shirt printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, noise, text, watermark, logo, ugly, poorly drawn, multiple figures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail
